zh.lifeSummary: 當Joan Neville於1423年2月3日出生在英國維爾爾索爾茲伯里時，她的父親Richard Neville22歲，母親Alice Montagu17歲。她於1460年2月4日與Thomas Grey在英國結婚。她去世於1462年9月9日之前，埋葬在英國素可阿盧德爾 卡素。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Joan Neville于1423年2月3日出生在英国維爾爾索爾茲伯里时，她的父亲Richard Neville22岁，母亲Alice Montagu17岁。她于1460年2月4日与Thomas Grey在英国结婚。她去世于1462年9月9日之前，埋葬在英国素可阿盧德爾 卡素。

nameMeanings.name: Neville
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish (of Norman origin): habitational name from Neuville in Calvados or Néville in Seine-Maritime, both so called from Old French neu(f) ‘new’ (from Latin novus) + ville ‘settlement’. One family line, originally from Neuville (Calvados), became powerful during the Wars of the Roses through Richard Neville (1428–71), 16th Earl of Warwick, nicknamed "The Kingmaker".
Irish (Munster): assimilation of the Gaelic name Ó Niadh (see Nee ) and sometimes of Ó Cnaimhín (see Nevin ).

History: George Neville came to VA in or c. 1700 and settled on the headwaters of the Occoquan River, acquiring a large estate. His descendants, bearing the surnames Neville and Craig, were of considerable importance in Pittsburgh, PA, and Cincinnati, OH.

meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of Neville , with post-medieval excrescent -s. This surname is now rare in Britain.

variants.name: Nevels
meanings: English and Scottish (Wigtownshire): of Norman origin, a variant of Neville , with post-medieval excrescent -s. This surname is now rare in Britain.
Dutch and North German: unexplained.

variants.name: Nee
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Dermot, John Patrick.

Irish (Galway): shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Niadh ‘descendant of Nia’ or Mac Niadh ‘son of Nia’. Compare McNee . Needham 2 and Neville have also been adopted as Anglicized forms of this name.
North German: possibly a relationship name from Middle Low German neve ‘nephew, grand-child’.

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

variants.name: John
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Joan Neville was born on 3 February 1423, in Salisbury, Wiltshire, England, her father, Richard Neville, was 22 and her mother, Alice Montagu, was 17. She married Thomas Grey on 4 February 1460, in England. She died before 9 September 1462, and was buried in Arundel Castle, Sussex, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joan Neville est née le 3 février 1423, à Salisbury, Wiltshire, Angleterre, son père, Richard Neville, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Alice Montagu, avait 17 ans. Elle a épousé Thomas Grey le 4 février 1460, à Angleterre. Elle est décédée avant 9 septembre 1462, et a été enterrée à Arundel Castle, Sussex, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Joan Neville am 3. Februar 1423 in Salisbury, Wiltshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Richard Neville 22 und ihre Mutter Alice Montagu 17. Sie hat am 4. Februar 1460 in England Thomas Grey geheiratet. Sie starb vor 9. September 1462 und wurde in Arundel Castle, Sussex, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Joan Neville è nata il il 3 febbraio 1423 nel Salisbury, Wiltshire, England, sua padre, Richard Neville, aveva 22 anni e sua madre, Alice Montagu, aveva 17 anni. Lei sposato Thomas Grey il 4 febbraio 1460, nel England. Morì prima del 9 settembre 1462, e fu sepolta a Arundel Castle, Sussex, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Joan Nevilleが1423年2月3日にイギリスウィルトシュアイアサリスブリーで生まれた時，父Richard Nevilleは22歳，母Alice Montaguは17歳であった。1460年2月4日にイギリスでThomas Greyと結婚した。彼女は1462年9月9日以前に死去し，イギリススセックスアルンデル カストルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Joan Neville(이)가 1423년 2월 3일 영국 윌츠히르 살리스버이에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Richard Neville(은)는 22세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Alice Montagu(은)는 17세였다. 그녀는 1460년 2월 4일 영국에서 Thomas Grey(와)과 결혼했다. 그녀는 1462년 9월 9일 이전 사망했으며 영국 수세스 아런들 카스틀에 묻혔다.

pt.3 February 1423–before 9 September 1462: 3 de fevereiro de 1423–antes 9 de setembro de 1462
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Joan Neville nasceu em 3 de fevereiro de 1423, em Salisbury, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Richard Neville, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Alice Montagu, tinha 17 anos. Ela casou-se com Thomas Grey em 4 de fevereiro de 1460, em Inglaterra. Ela faleceu antes 9 de setembro de 1462, e foi sepultada em Arundel Castle, Sussex, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joan Neville родилась 3 февраля 1423 г. в местности салисбури, уилцхир, Англия, её отцу по имени Richard Neville было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Alice Montagu, 17. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas Grey 4 февраля 1460 г. в местности Англия. Она умерла перед 9 сентябрь 1462 г. и была похоронена в местности арундель кастл, суссекс, Англия.

Se casó con Thomas Grey el 4 de febrero de 1460, en Inglaterra. Murió antes de 9 de septiembre de 1462, y fue sepultada en Arundel Castle, Sussex, Inglaterra.
